planSteps.description: Navigate to /api/mock-login?secret=mantiz_e2e_bypass_2026 to authenticate the session
Verify the Settings page shows a range input slider with id='threshold-slider' and a nearby numeric label showing a value between 0 and 100
Verify a toggle button with id='ai-detection-toggle' is visible on the settings page
Click the toggle button with id='ai-detection-toggle' to change its current state
Click the Save Settings button with id='save-settings-button'
Verify the Save Settings button (id='save-settings-button') shows the text 'Saved!' confirming settings were persisted
